text: Detour signs shall be erected at the nearest points of detour from that portion of a highway, or from any bridge, which is closed to traffic while under construction or repair.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 2. Traffic Signs, Signals, and Markings [21350 - 21468]
#### Article 1. Erection and Maintenance [21350 - 21376]
##### § 21363

Detour signs shall be erected at the nearest points of detour from that portion of a highway, or from any bridge, which is closed to traffic while under construction or repair.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Detour signs shall be erected at the nearest points of detour from that portion of a highway, or from any bridge, which is closed to traffic while under construction or repair.
